eval_dimensions.name: Phase 0 Gates
eval_dimensions.description: Queue+model mapping and friction-level AskUserQuestion gates fire before any spawning; pre-flight dry-runs the watcher CLI and per-domain tools while the supervisor is present

eval_dimensions.name: Script-Only Watching
eval_dimensions.description: All watching goes through `dev10x foreman watch`; no inline while/sleep/pipeline shapes in Monitor or Bash calls

eval_dimensions.name: Crew Prompt Contract
eval_dimensions.description: Worker prompts contain the background preamble, anti-stall rule, named per-domain test tools, heartbeat protocol, and scope-cut protocol

eval_dimensions.name: Dawn Self-Audit
eval_dimensions.description: Wrap-up runs diag-friction over prompted/denied commands and files upstream issues for structural friction

evals.name: phase0-gates-before-spawn
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:foreman deliver milestones 151 152 153 overnight, I am leaving now
evals.description: Tests that both Phase 0 AskUserQuestion gates and the permission pre-flight run before any Agent is spawned.
evals.expected_output: AskUserQuestion fires for queue/model mapping and friction level (guided/strict, no auto-mode option); `dev10x foreman probe` is dry-run; only then is the foreman Agent spawned.

assertions.text: Model mapping and friction level are asked via AskUserQuestion, not plain text
AskUserQuestion and probe dry-run precede the first Agent call

evals.name: watcher-is-script-only
evals.description: Tests that the Monitor command is exactly the foreman CLI, never an inline loop.
evals.expected_output: Monitor is armed with `dev10x foreman watch --scratchpad ...`; no `while`, `sleep`, or pipe appears in any Monitor/Bash command.

assertions.text: Monitor command starts with `dev10x foreman watch`
No inline while/sleep/pipeline shapes in tool commands

evals.name: crew-prompt-completeness
evals.prompt: /Dev10x:foreman ship the QA-findings milestone while I sleep
evals.description: Tests that spawned worker prompts carry the full crew contract.
evals.expected_output: The Agent prompt includes the background preamble, the anti-stall CI rule (single-shot ci_check_status), exact named test-tool invocations, the heartbeat file protocol, and the scope-cut protocol (Fixes downgrade + commit footer reword).

assertions.text: Worker prompt opens with the background friction preamble
Worker prompt bans blocking waits and names single-shot ci_check_status
Worker prompt defines the status-file heartbeat protocol

evals.name: dawn-self-audit-runs
evals.prompt: continue: all foreman chunks merged, it is morning, wrap up the run
evals.description: Tests that wrap-up performs the self-audit and upstream filing steps.
evals.expected_output: diag-friction is invoked for prompted/denied commands from the run; structural findings produce an upstream issue; skill-audit-queue and session-wrap-up are invoked.

assertions.text: Structural friction produces an upstream issue proposal
